chapter_title.ar: باب الَّذِي عِنْدَهُ أَرْبَعُ نِسْوَةٍ فَيُطَلِّقُ وَاحِدَةً وَ يَتَزَوَّجُ قَبْلَ انْقِضَاءِ عِدَّتِهَا أَوْ يَتَزَوَّجُ خَمْسَ نِسْوَةٍ فِي عَقْدَةٍ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 82 – The one with whom are four wives, so he divorces one, and he marries (another) before the expiration of her waiting period, or he marries five women in a (marriage) tie

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/190)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/190)
text: إِذَا جَمَعَ الرَّجُلُ أَرْبَعاً فَطَلَّقَ إِحْدَاهُنَّ فَلَا يَتَزَوَّجِ الْخَامِسَةَ حَتَّى تَنْقَضِيَ عِدَّةُ الْمَرْأَةِ الَّتِي طَلَّقَ وَ قَالَ لَا يَجْمَعِ الرَّجُلُ مَاءَهُ فِي خَمْسٍ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Jameel Bin Darraj, from Zurara Bin Ayn and Muhammad Bin Muslim,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘When the man gathers four (wives), so he divorces one of them, so he cannot marry the fifth until the expiration of the waiting period of the wife he has divorces’. And he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The man cannot gather his water (seed) in five (wives)’.
en.sarwar: 1. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from Jamil ibn Darraj from Zurarah ibn ‘A‘yan and Muhammad ibn Muslim who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘If a man accumulates four wives then divorces one, he cannot marry the fifth before the end of waiting period of the woman whom he has divorced.’ He (the Imam) said, ‘A man cannot deposit his water in five.’”
